body_sections.heading: What You Will Learn
body_sections.content: Foundations 2.0 is a 6-week intensive program that teaches context engineering for agentic AI systems. You will build real production systems using Claude, GPT-4, and open-source models. Every lesson is hands-on: no slides, no theory without application. By the end, you will have a portfolio of working AI agents deployed in your own business.

body_sections.heading: Who This Is For
body_sections.content: Business operators, technical founders, and solo practitioners who want to build AI-powered workflows that actually run in production. No prior AI experience required. You need a laptop, a willingness to build, and 8-10 hours per week.

body_sections.heading: Program Structure
body_sections.content: Week 1-2: Prompt architecture and context window management. Week 3-4: Multi-agent orchestration and tool use. Week 5-6: Production deployment, monitoring, and iteration. Live sessions every Tuesday and Thursday. Slack community access for the duration of the cohort plus 90 days alumni access.

body_sections.heading: What Makes This Different
body_sections.content: Built by operators who run AI systems in production daily, not researchers writing papers. Every technique taught is battle-tested across real businesses generating real revenue. Our students ship working systems during the program, not after.

cta.text: Apply for the Next Cohort at aibuildlab.com/foundations
